title: XL Supershape Pink Princess Castle 34″ x 31″ Suitable for Air or Helium Perfect Birthday Party Decoration
features: This Foil Balloon Mesaures approx 34″/87cm.h x 31″/78cm.w
Suitable for Air or Helium (Balloon Will Only Float if Using Helium)
Our Foil Balloons are fitted with a self sealing valve that will keep the balloon inflated and prevent the air or helium escaping
Supplied Flat - Balloon May Arrive Loose Without Any Retail Packaging
description: Product description Our foil balloons are manufactured to a very high standard and comply with EU and UK Safety Standards. The balloons are suitable for both helium and air filling. Foil balloons will retain their helium longer than latex balloons and can often last for over a week before losing buoyancy. The foil is tough and less prone to popping than latex. However, they are more vulnerable to heat damage and don’t enjoy being exposed to hot temperatures. CONCEPT: Our exclusive and advanced manufacturing own systems, provide us a great flexibility to produce the most diverse shapes and sizes of mylar balloons. LEADERSHIP: Thanks to our distributors and customers around the world, Flexmetal has become in one of the most prestigious companies in the market. DESIGN: Flexmetal, company founded in 1987, offers the best quality, innovation, design and service in every one of our products to our customers Safety Warning To be used under the direct supervision of an adult
